feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Holy shit. It took me SIX HOURS to fucking mod this game. I downloaded roughly 7…
entry.content: Holy shit. It took me SIX HOURS to fucking mod this game. I downloaded roughly 70 mods and only had to cut about ten of them. I would have never fucking been able to get it working without the help of AI. The "average" person cannot do modding without help. You literally have to fucking know how to code and fix scripts. I had to keep taking screenshots of the script/merge issues and ask Gemini how to fix each one, granted once you know how it's not super hard but still... Absolutely fucking reta

entry.title: /b/ Random: anonymous dead?? can it come back?

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Why am I not blond and blue-eyed. Nobody thinks I'm cute
entry.content: I just hate you Atheist and Skeptical motherfuckers. Just kill yourselves. I deserve being white, blond, and blue-eyed. It's too unfair. White fair people are the luckiest on Earth. Darker you are, uglier you are. I don't like having dark traits such as olive skin, black hair, and black eyes, I just wish I was fair. I want to be pretty and attractive. I want to be treated as a prince. If you are skeptical and atheist, you're just retarded and dumb. Nobody disappears when they die, imbecile. If y

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Disney "we have plan for Star Wars. We’re knee deep into it"
entry.content: >We’re done shooting Starfighter and it’s being cut together now,” says the Disney source. “We definitely have a plan as to what we’re going to do next with the franchise after that. We’re knee-deep into it. This has been an ongoing plan for a while.”

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Obsession star Inde Navarrette says she went a year and a half without landing a…
entry.content: Obsession star Inde Navarrette says she went a year and a half without landing another acting role after filming the horror movie. >“I was auditioning… nothing was sticking” During that time, she paid rent by walking dogs and streaming video games on a PC she built herself.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: (λ) - ᵋLisp General
entry.content: >Lisp is a family of programming languages with a long history and a distinctive parenthesized prefix notation. There are many dialects of Lisp, including Common Lisp, Scheme, Clojure and Elisp. >Emacs is an extensible, customizable, self-documenting free/libre text editor and computing environment, with a Lisp interpreter at its core. >Emacs Resources https://gnu.org/s/emacs https://github.com/emacs-tw/awesome -emacs https://github.com/systemcrafters/c rafted-emacs >Learning Emacs C-h t (Intera

entry.title: /o/ Auto: /mg/ Miata General - MGB Edition
entry.content: >For Miatas and MGBs made from 1962 or newer, with few exceptions. >Everybody has their own taste, but some tastes are wrong. If you aren't sure if your car is a Miata / MGB or not, it's not. >Your MG Miata belongs here. >Jap, Brit, or whatever. >Post your Miata or MGB, your work on it, your hackery, and get advice. >Any and all discussion about Miatas and MGB's welcome, but may not necessarily generate responses; don't get butthurt. >Pop ups > flush. >Metal > rust. >Classic Miat > modern Miat.

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /flg/ - F-List General #8397 A Very Vintage Story Edition Previous Thread: >>836…
entry.content: /flg/ - F-List General #8397 A Very Vintage Story Edition Previous Thread: >>83634524 VS General: >>>/vm/2544647 F-list is a website for people interested in erotic roleplaying, and creating character profiles to find like-minded partners with similar interests and fetishes to roleplay with. It features a webchat (which can be used for textual roleplaying), group forums and more kinks and depravity than you can memorize. The purpose of this thread is to serve as a place where roleplayers can fre

entry.title: /g/ Technology: >they don't make their own CPUs >don't make their own GPUs >don't make their own…
entry.content: >they don't make their own CPUs >don't make their own GPUs >don't make their own RAM >don't make their own SSDs >don't really make anything So, what exactly was Valve's contribution here and why don't they deserve to be fucked over by the market forces?

entry.title: /g/ Technology: If Linux simply copied the way Windows handles window composition ever since the…
entry.content: If Linux simply copied the way Windows handles window composition ever since the Longhorn rewrite, there wouldn't be an issue with having to choose between two dogshit window compositors, where one is ancient and the other is overengineered. There'd just be one ancient compositor and one good compositor, with the latter becoming the de facto standard.

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Welcome To My Nightmare [Atlantic, 1975] Alice Cooper's ear for what the kids wa…
entry.content: Welcome To My Nightmare [Atlantic, 1975] Alice Cooper's ear for what the kids want to hear remains almost as keen as his imperviousness to moral suasion. "Cold Ethyl" remains his catchiest necrophilia song to date, "Department of Youth" his catchiest teen-power anthem to date, and "Only Women Bleed" is the most explicitly feminist song yet to hit top 40. Since Alice's ear for what the kids want to hear remains as keen as ever, it's a safe bet to assume that a few of the more obvious feminist tru

entry.title: /int/ International: What are the characteristics of the mafia or gangs in your country?
entry.content: In Japan, someone missing a little finger is a former member of the Japanese mafia. A few years ago, I saw some yakuza at a pasta restaurant. There were several luxury cars in the parking lot, and the windows had purple curtains. At the back of the restaurant, there was an elderly man wearing a fedora and a purple scarf, with several men in suits standing around him. I assume that old man was a high-ranking yakuza boss.

entry.title: /mu/ Music: What percentage of a catalog can you dislike while saying you like an artist?
entry.content: I was thinking about the phenomenon of listening to an artist's catalog and liking maybe 50/50 or even only 25/75 of their work......if you really like those songs but don't really care for most of their work, at what point can you say whether you like an Artist or not? I get with Pop it is different but with other music where image is less of a thing, I am curious......

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /glory/ - Discord Gloryhole Bot General
entry.content: GloryBot is an anonymous chatbot that quietly pairs you up with another member for a private one-on-one conversation, and neither of you ever see who the other is. You talk through the bot's DMs and it carries your messages back and forth. https://discord.gg/3B2DR9hEKh Previous: >>83608956

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Disney Failed to Buy James Bond Franchise, Walked Away From Owning Twitter
entry.content: >“It was like the clouds lifted and the sun started to shine again,” Iger said. “We put together a list of acquisition targets. Marvel was one, ‘Star Wars’ was another, James Bond was one. We had a list and I figured let’s just tick them off and buy them all.” >James Bond is the franchise that got away (Amazon is its current owner). Other companies did, too. Iger told FT that he was close to buying Twitter from owner Jack Dorsey “at a very attractive price.” The plan was to turn Twitter into a g

entry.title: /mu/ Music: I had never listened to or seen Oliver Tree talk before his passing. I often saw…
entry.content: I had never listened to or seen Oliver Tree talk before his passing. I often saw his face in Youtube thumbnails and what not but never clicked. Anyway I have listened to some songs and also watched a lot of his interviews.. especially his podcast appearances on H3H3. The guy seemed really nice, cool and very passionate about what he did. Even though i've barely watched the guy, I feel extremely sad about his passing. I keep thinking about how he must have felt when the helicopter was going down.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Automated moderation has ruined social media
entry.content: >have instagram account for lite trolling >get banned for rapidly commenting once >appeal >get unbanned 10 mins later >get auto-banned 10 mins later >appeal >repeat 10x >these random bans keep coming despite the fact I ceased my activity completely, I always get unsuspended in 10 minutes >one day the random ban can't be appealed >account lost forever, no reason provided, no platform to write a form to get an actual person to review my case >have private xitter account for bookmarking >11 year ol

entry.title: /o/ Auto: I was planning to buy a car for $10k but I can't make up my fucking mind which c…
entry.content: I was planning to buy a car for $10k but I can't make up my fucking mind which car to buy so I've been paying for an empty parking spot since I sold my previous car more than a month ago. Anyone ever buy a total shitbox just to have something to drive while you're making up your mind what to buy? Is that a good idea?
